name: Quality Control
description: Inspection, calibration, non-conformance / CAR, internal audits, supplier quality and ISO / QMS cadence.

items.title: In-process inspection
items.description: Shop-floor inspection at defined hold points; record deviations.

items.title: Line clearance & first-piece approval
items.description: First-piece approval for each setup / batch change.

items.title: Weekly NCR / CAR review
items.description: Review open non-conformance reports and corrective-action requests; set closure targets.

items.title: Weekly rejection MIS
items.description: Publish in-process, final and supplier rejection PPM vs targets.

items.title: Instrument calibration tracker
items.description: Track calibration due dates for gauges, meters, testing equipment; raise PO for external calibration.

items.title: Supplier quality rating
items.description: Publish monthly supplier rating (PPM, OTIF, response on NCR) and share with purchase.

items.title: Cost of Quality report
items.description: Rework, scrap, customer claims and warranty cost summary.

items.title: Internal QMS audit
items.description: Planned internal audit against ISO 9001 clauses; log observations in audit tracker.

items.title: Management Review Meeting (MRM)
items.description: Quarterly MRM covering quality objectives, audits, customer feedback, risks & opportunities.

items.title: Supplier audit cycle
items.description: On-site audits of critical suppliers per the approved audit plan.

items.title: ISO 9001 surveillance / recertification audit
items.description: External certification body audit — logistics, CAPA readiness, document control evidence.

items.title: Customer satisfaction survey
items.description: Annual CSAT survey — aggregate scores, analyse complaints, feed into MRM.

items.title: QMS document review
items.description: Annual review of SOPs, work instructions, quality manual; archive obsolete versions.
